# Pin.Products
<!-- Auto-generated by /c-setup-l -->

Blazor Server (.NET 8) app for managing products and categories via an external API (Escuela JS).

## Getting Started

### Prerequisites
- .NET 8 SDK

### Installation
```bash
dotnet restore Pin.Products.Web.sln
dotnet build Pin.Products.Web.sln
```

### Running
```bash
dotnet run --project Pin.Products.Web
```

## Project Structure

|    Subproject     |     Type      |                         Description                          |
| :---------------: | :-----------: | :----------------------------------------------------------: |
| Pin.Products.Core | Class Library | API service layer — HttpClient services, models, interfaces  |
| Pin.Products.Web  | Blazor Server | UI — pages (Products, Categories), reusable components       |

See subproject guides for details:
- `Pin.Products.Core/CLAUDE-CORE.md`
- `Pin.Products.Web/CLAUDE-WEB.md`

## Tech Stack
- .NET 8 / Blazor Server (Interactive Server Render Mode)
- Bootstrap CSS (bundled)
- External API: Escuela JS (`https://api.escuelajs.co/api/v1/`)
